'''Selwin Markota''' was [[Todra Mayn]]'s second in command onboard the [[Pride of Selonia (Lancer-class)|''Pride of Selonia'']] during its missions to [[Galantos]], [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], [[Onadax]] and [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]]. He was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] with a receding hair line, solidly built and an excellent administrator who was good in crisis'.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
